Top-rated experiences — Manuel Antonio

Show all
Hiking
Manuel Antonio National Park Tour · 3.5 hrs
Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
★ 4.9
Walk through one of Costa Rica's most famous parks with an expert bilingual guide. Sloths, monkeys, reptiles and a stop at Third Beach.
$84.75 / person
Rafting
Savegre River Rafting — Class III · 5.5 hrs
Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
★ 4.9
Navigate Class III rapids through spectacular jungle canyons on the Savegre River. All year round. Lunch included.
$129.95 / person
Canopy
Canopy Tour — 12 Lines, 22 Platforms · 3 hrs
Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
★ 4.8
Soar through the treetops on 12 ziplines, a Tarzan swing and a rappel. Inside the same biological corridor as Manuel Antonio National Park.
$111.87 / person
Surf
Surf Lessons — All Levels Welcome · 3 hrs
Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
★ 4.8
Learn to surf on one of the Pacific Coast's best spots. Certified instructors, boards included. Beginners to advanced.
$105.94 / person
Sailing
Catamaran Adventure — Snorkeling & BBQ · 5 hrs
Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
★ 4.8
Sail around Manuel Antonio National Park on a catamaran. Snorkel at Biesanz Bay, spot dolphins and enjoy a BBQ lunch onboard.
$105.94 / person
Horseback
Horseback Riding through the Jungle · 5.5 hrs
Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
★ 4.8
Ride through secondary rainforest at 600m altitude with stunning valley views. Ends at a beautiful waterfall for a refreshing swim.
$100.57 / person
Kayak
Damas Island Mangrove Kayaking · 4 hrs
Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
★ 4.9
Paddle through Costa Rica's unique mangrove ecosystem on the Paquita River. Spot herons, monkeys, anteaters and exotic birds.
$96.05 / person
Kayak
Ocean Kayaking & Snorkeling · 4 hrs
Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
★ 4.8
Paddle past islands and marine bird colonies, then snorkel at secluded Biesanz Bay. Parrotfish, starfish and maybe sea turtles.
$96.05 / person
Cultural
Chocolate, Vanilla & Coffee Farm Tour · 5.5 hrs
Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
★ 4.8
Walk through an organic farm where cacao, vanilla and coffee grow. Learn how chocolate is made, meet the farm animals and enjoy a farm-to-table lunch.
$100.57 / person
Extreme Rafting
El Chorro — Extreme Rafting Class IV · 4 hrs
Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
★ 4.9
Conquer El Chorro, a Class IV gorge on the upper Naranjo River. The most intense rafting experience in Manuel Antonio. January–April only.
$129.95 / person

How ThrillCR works

1
Browse & choose

Filter experiences by zone, category, price, or difficulty level. Real photos, verified reviews, and full itineraries for every listing.

2
Book & pay securely

Select your date and group size. Pay with credit card or SINPE Móvil. Instant email confirmation — no waiting, no phone calls.

3
Show up & experience it

Bring your booking confirmation. The provider takes care of everything else. Afterwards, share your review to help other adventurers.

Are you an adventure provider in Costa Rica?

List your experience on ThrillCR and reach thousands of travelers looking for exactly what you offer. No upfront cost — we only earn when you do.
